source.section: Part 9 - Radar & Sensors > 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.5 - Pointing Methods

steps.action: WYPT OSB (Option Select Button) selected on the HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator)
steps.voiced: Confirm WYPT is selected on the HSI.
Confirm your desired waypoint is set.

steps.action: WPDSG (Waypoint Designate) OSB selected Snowplow Mode Targeting Pod is Powered Up
steps.voiced: Select WPDSG — pod powered and slaved to that point.
